sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27829" key="doqihniko/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοθῐηνικόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n27829.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remedy for boils,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
